allOf.description: MetricsBuilderConfig is a configuration for sample metrics builder.

metrics.description: MetricsConfig provides config for sample metrics.

default.metric.description: DefaultMetricMetricConfig provides config for the default.metric metric.

default.metric.to_be_removed.description: DefaultMetricToBeRemovedMetricConfig provides config for the default.metric.to_be_removed metric.

metric.input_type.description: MetricInputTypeMetricConfig provides config for the metric.input_type metric.

optional.metric.description: OptionalMetricMetricConfig provides config for the optional.metric metric.

optional.metric.empty_unit.description: OptionalMetricEmptyUnitMetricConfig provides config for the optional.metric.empty_unit metric.

reaggregate.metric.description: ReaggregateMetricMetricConfig provides config for the reaggregate.metric metric.

reaggregate.metric.with_required.description: ReaggregateMetricWithRequiredMetricConfig provides config for the reaggregate.metric.with_required metric.

system.cpu.time.description: SystemCPUTimeMetricConfig provides config for the system.cpu.time metric.

system.memory.usage.description: SystemMemoryUsageMetricConfig provides config for the system.memory.usage metric.

resource_attributes.description: ResourceAttributesConfig provides config for sample resource attributes.

map.resource.attr.description: ResourceAttributeConfig provides common config for a map.resource.attr resource attribute.

events_exclude.description: Experimental: EventsExclude defines a list of filters for attribute values. If the list is not empty, events with matching resource attribute values will not be emitted. EventsInclude has higher priority than EventsExclude.

items.description: Config configures the matching behavior of a Filter.

events_include.description: Experimental: EventsInclude defines a list of filters for attribute values. If the list is not empty, only events with matching resource attribute values will be emitted.
